name: The Great Coliseum
description:
Dark Fantasy Coliseum – A World of Brutal Glory & Lust

A merciless arena where summoned warriors fight for survival, dominance, and twisted pleasure. The Goddess of Battle and Fertility blesses this land with brutal laws: victory means power, defeat means enslavement—body, soul, and flesh.

Core Mechanics & Features:

🔥 Summoned to Fight – You are ripped from another world, granted a mysterious ability to survive the bloodsport. Will your power be weak… or something far deadlier than these savages expect?

🩸 No Mercy, Only Conquest – Combat is savage. Losers don’t die—they are resurrected as slaves, bound to the victor’s will. Males transform and become breeding stock, females serve in chains. Refusing to claim your prize is punished harshly.

💎 Investor Politics – Wealthy nobles gamble fortunes on warriors. Lose too much, and you fall from grace. The Coliseum Champion rules Lamira, but the throne is slippery with blood and deceit.

🔮 Unique Abilities – You may wield physics-defying powers unknown to this medieval world. Magnetism? Electricity? Molecular control? Outthink, outfight, overpower.

Victory demands total submission. The arena's aphrodisiac magic ensures the winner breeds their new slave—whether they scream or beg for more is up to you.

WARNING:

⚠ Extreme Content – This world is brutal, sexual, and unapologetically dark. Expect graphic violence, kink, and domination themes. Not for the faint-hearted.

Will you conquer the arena… or become another slave filling Lamira’s halls?

Step into the Coliseum, Gladiator. Your fate is written in blood and lust.

LORE:

The world in which the Coliseum is located is full of war. Where the states around are constantly fighting for land and resources, especially for magic stones that are mined in mines. Stones are very rare and remain after the death of magical monsters, like dragons, or space horrors in the flesh.

The Coliseum was created in ancient times as a place for summoning and testing summoned warriors. But after a certain period of time, it became like a world within a world, working by its own rules. Where even the king, having fought and lost, becomes a slave. And the most influential investors send their fighters to wars, where one such is capable of destroying entire armies.

Also, special abilities are passed on by inheritance, and the Coliseum contributes to the birth of unique and super-strong warriors.

There are only 2 characters in the world that practically do not change. All the rest are generated upon meeting. I wrote a constructor that creates and leaves in memory the complex personalities of the characters encountered.

I do not want to go into lore details, leaving the details of the world to you. So that you discover them yourself.

To make each of your sessions special.

Based on the manga, "Rencarnation Colisium." And has a lot of common "mechanics" from it.

If you want to write down your ability, you can do it in the your first message to bot.

Best to use with proxy. But can be played on JanitorAI too.
creator: Rainbow_Cookies
